comments: Approved. The drafted contract is tightly bounded to repository hygiene limited to deleting .DS_Store artifacts and updating .gitignore. The description and scope both constrain execution to purging .DS_Store files and ensuring they are ignored going forward; although the scope says 'tracked in the Git repository and physically present in the workspace,' that language still remains within the .DS_Store deletion boundary and does not authorize broader repository edits. The allowed_files list is properly restricted to '.gitignore' and '**/.DS_Store', which limits implementation modifications to the ignore file and .DS_Store wildcard paths exactly as required. Out-of-scope language further narrows behavior by forbidding task archiving, documentation changes, MCP source changes, and workflow mutation beyond artifact generation, while stop_conditions explicitly block modification or deletion of any non-targeted file. Overall, the contract is sufficiently constrained for the requested M1 phase.
